tepig.flavorText: It can deftly dodge its foe’s attacks while shooting fireballs from its nose. It roasts berries before it eats them.

pignite.name: Pignite
pignite.flavorText: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

emboar.name: Emboar
emboar.flavorText: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

oshawott.name: Oshawott
oshawott.flavorText: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

dewott.name: Dewott
dewott.flavorText: Strict training is how it learns its flowing double-scalchop technique.

samurott.name: Samurott
samurott.flavorText: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

patrat.name: Patrat
patrat.flavorText: Using food stored in cheek pouches, they can keep watch for days. They use their tails to communicate with others.

watchog.name: Watchog
watchog.flavorText: When they see an enemy, their tails stand high, and they spit the seeds of berries stored in their cheek pouches.

lillipup.name: Lillipup
lillipup.flavorText: It faces strong opponents with great courage. But, when at a disadvantage in a fight, this intelligent Pokémon flees.

herdier.name: Herdier
herdier.flavorText: It has black, cape-like fur that is very hard and decreases the amount of damage it receives.

stoutland.name: Stoutland
stoutland.flavorText: It rescues people stranded by blizzards in the mountains. Its shaggy fur shields it from the cold.

purrloin.name: Purrloin
purrloin.flavorText: They steal from people for fun, but their victims can’t help but forgive them. Their deceptively cute act is perfect.

liepard.name: Liepard
liepard.flavorText: These Pokémon vanish and appear unexpectedly. Many Trainers are drawn to their beautiful form and fur.

pansage.name: Pansage
pansage.flavorText: This Pokémon dwells deep in the forest. Eating a leaf from its head whisks weariness away as if by magic.

simisage.name: Simisage
simisage.flavorText: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

pansear.name: Pansear
pansear.flavorText: When it is angered, the temperature of its head tuft reaches 600° F. It uses its tuft to roast berries.

simisear.name: Simisear
simisear.flavorText: It loves sweets because they become energy for the fire burning inside its body.

panpour.name: Panpour
panpour.flavorText: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

simipour.name: Simipour
simipour.flavorText: The tuft on its head holds water. When the level runs low, it replenishes the tuft by siphoning up water with its tail.

munna.name: Munna
munna.flavorText: Munna always float in the air. People whose dreams are eaten by them forget what the dreams had been about.

musharna.name: Musharna
musharna.flavorText: The mist emanating from their foreheads is packed with the dreams of people and Pokémon.

pidove.name: Pidove
pidove.flavorText: Each follows its Trainer’s orders as best it can, but they sometimes fail to understand complicated commands.

tranquill.name: Tranquill
tranquill.flavorText: It can return to its Trainer’s location regardless of the distance separating them.

unfezant.name: Unfezant
unfezant.flavorText: Males swing their head plumage to threaten opponents. The females’ flying abilities surpass those of the males.

blitzle.name: Blitzle
blitzle.flavorText: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

zebstrika.name: Zebstrika
zebstrika.flavorText: They have lightning-like movements. When Zebstrika run at full speed, the sound of thunder reverberates.

roggenrola.name: Roggenrola
roggenrola.flavorText: Its ear is hexagonal in shape. Compressed underground, its body is as hard as steel.

boldore.name: Boldore
boldore.flavorText: When it overflows with power, the orange crystal on its body glows. It looks for underground water in caves.

gigalith.name: Gigalith
gigalith.flavorText: Compressing the energy from its internal core lets it fire off an attack capable of blowing away a mountain.

woobat.name: Woobat
woobat.flavorText: Its habitat is dark forests and caves. It emits ultrasonic waves from its nose to learn about its surroundings.

swoobat.name: Swoobat
swoobat.flavorText: It emits sound waves of various frequencies from its nose, including some powerful enough to destroy rocks.

drilbur.name: Drilbur
drilbur.flavorText: It can dig through the ground at a speed of 30 mph. It could give a car running aboveground a good race.

excadrill.name: Excadrill
excadrill.flavorText: It can help in tunnel construction. Its drill has evolved into steel strong enough to bore through iron plates.

audino.name: Audino
audino.flavorText: It touches others with the feelers on its ears, using the sound of their heartbeats to tell how they are feeling.

timburr.name: Timburr
timburr.flavorText: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.

gurdurr.name: Gurdurr
gurdurr.flavorText: This Pokémon is so muscular and strongly built that even a group of wrestlers could not make it budge an inch.

conkeldurr.name: Conkeldurr
conkeldurr.flavorText: It is thought that Conkeldurr taught humans how to make concrete more than 2,000 years ago.

tympole.name: Tympole
tympole.flavorText: They warn others of danger by vibrating their cheeks to create a high-pitched sound.

palpitoad.name: Palpitoad
palpitoad.flavorText: When they vibrate the bumps on their heads, they can make waves in water or earthquake-like vibrations on land.

seismitoad.name: Seismitoad
seismitoad.flavorText: They shoot paralyzing liquid from their head bumps. They use vibration to hurt their opponents.

throh.name: Throh
throh.flavorText: When it tightens its belt, it becomes stronger. Wild Throh use vines to weave their own belts.

sawk.name: Sawk
sawk.flavorText: The sound of Sawk punching boulders and trees can be heard all the way from the mountains where they train.

sewaddle.name: Sewaddle
sewaddle.flavorText: Leavanny dress it in clothes they made for it when it hatched. It hides its head in its hood while it is sleeping.

swadloon.name: Swadloon
swadloon.flavorText: Forests where Swadloon live have superb foliage because the nutrients they make from fallen leaves nourish the plant life.

leavanny.name: Leavanny
leavanny.flavorText: Upon finding a small Pokémon, it weaves clothing for it from leaves, using the cutters on its arms and sticky silk.

venipede.name: Venipede
venipede.flavorText: Its bite injects a potent poison, enough to paralyze large bird Pokémon that try to prey on it.

whirlipede.name: Whirlipede
whirlipede.flavorText: Protected by a hard shell, it spins its body like a wheel and crashes furiously into its enemies.

scolipede.name: Scolipede
scolipede.flavorText: With quick movements, it chases down its foes, attacking relentlessly with its horns until it prevails.

cottonee.name: Cottonee
cottonee.flavorText: When attacked, it escapes by shooting cotton from its body. The cotton serves as a decoy to distract the attacker.

whimsicott.name: Whimsicott
whimsicott.flavorText: Like the wind, it can slip through any gap, no matter how small. It leaves balls of white fluff behind.

petilil.name: Petilil
petilil.flavorText: The leaves on its head are very bitter. Eating one of these leaves is known to refresh a tired body.

lilligant.name: Lilligant
lilligant.flavorText: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

basculin.name: Basculin
basculin.flavorText: Red and blue Basculin get along so poorly, they’ll start fighting instantly. These Pokémon are very hostile.

sandile.name: Sandile
sandile.flavorText: They live buried in the sands of the desert. The sun-warmed sands prevent their body temperature from dropping.

krokorok.name: Krokorok
krokorok.flavorText: They live in groups of a few individuals. Protective membranes shield their eyes from sandstorms.

krookodile.name: Krookodile
krookodile.flavorText: They never allow prey to escape. Their jaws are so powerful, they can crush the body of an automobile.

darumaka.name: Darumaka
darumaka.flavorText: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

darmanitan.name: Darmanitan
darmanitan.flavorText: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.

maractus.name: Maractus
maractus.flavorText: It uses an up-tempo song and dance to drive away the bird Pokémon that prey on its flower seeds.

dwebble.name: Dwebble
dwebble.flavorText: This Pokémon can easily melt holes in hard rocks with a liquid secreted from its mouth.

crustle.name: Crustle
crustle.flavorText: Competing for territory, Crustle fight viciously. The one whose boulder is broken is the loser of the battle.

scraggy.name: Scraggy
scraggy.flavorText: Its skin has a rubbery elasticity, so it can reduce damage by defensively pulling its skin up to its neck.

scrafty.name: Scrafty
scrafty.flavorText: Groups of them beat up anything that enters their territory. Each can spit acidic liquid from its mouth.

sigilyph.name: Sigilyph
sigilyph.flavorText: They never vary the route they fly, because their memories of guarding an ancient city remain steadfast.

yamask.name: Yamask
yamask.flavorText: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

cofagrigus.name: Cofagrigus
cofagrigus.flavorText: It has been said that they swallow those who get too close and turn them into mummies. They like to eat gold nuggets.

tirtouga.name: Tirtouga
tirtouga.flavorText: Restored from a fossil, this Pokémon can dive to depths beyond half a mile.

carracosta.name: Carracosta
carracosta.flavorText: They can live both in the ocean and on land. A slap from one of them is enough to open a hole in the bottom of a tanker.

archen.name: Archen
archen.flavorText: Said to be an ancestor of bird Pokémon, they were unable to fly and moved about by hopping from one branch to another.

archeops.name: Archeops
archeops.flavorText: They are intelligent and will cooperate to catch prey. From the ground, they use a running start to take flight.

trubbish.name: Trubbish
trubbish.flavorText: Inhaling the gas they belch will make you sleep for a week. They prefer unsanitary places.

garbodor.name: Garbodor
garbodor.flavorText: It clenches opponents with its left arm and finishes them off with foul-smelling poison gas belched from its mouth.

zorua.name: Zorua
zorua.flavorText: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

zoroark.name: Zoroark
zoroark.flavorText: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

minccino.name: Minccino
minccino.flavorText: They greet one another by rubbing each other with their tails, which are always kept well groomed and clean.

cinccino.name: Cinccino
cinccino.flavorText: Their white fur is coated in a special oil that makes it easy for them to deflect attacks.

gothita.name: Gothita
gothita.flavorText: Their ribbonlike feelers increase their psychic power. They are always staring at something.

gothorita.name: Gothorita
gothorita.flavorText: They use hypnosis to control people and Pokémon. Tales of Gothorita leading people astray are told in every corner.

gothitelle.name: Gothitelle
gothitelle.flavorText: Starry skies thousands of light-years away are visible in the space distorted by their intense psychic power.

solosis.name: Solosis
solosis.flavorText: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.

duosion.name: Duosion
duosion.flavorText: Since they have two divided brains, at times they suddenly try to take two different actions at once.

reuniclus.name: Reuniclus
reuniclus.flavorText: When Reuniclus shake hands, a network forms between their brains, increasing their psychic power.

ducklett.name: Ducklett
ducklett.flavorText: These bird Pokémon are excellent divers. They swim around in the water eating their favorite food--peat moss.

swanna.name: Swanna
swanna.flavorText: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

vanillite.name: Vanillite
vanillite.flavorText: The temperature of their breath is -58° F. They create snow crystals and make snow fall in the areas around them.

vanillish.name: Vanillish
vanillish.flavorText: Snowy mountains are this Pokémon’s habitat. During an ancient ice age, they moved to southern areas.

vanilluxe.name: Vanilluxe
vanilluxe.flavorText: Swallowing large amounts of water, they make snow clouds inside their bodies and attack their foes with violent blizzards.

deerling.name: Deerling
deerling.flavorText: The color and scent of their fur changes to match the mountain grass. When they sense hostility, they hide in the grass.

sawsbuck.name: Sawsbuck
sawsbuck.flavorText: They migrate according to the seasons. People can tell the season by looking at Sawsbuck’s horns.

emolga.name: Emolga
emolga.flavorText: The energy made in its cheeks’ electric pouches is stored inside its membrane and released while it is gliding.

karrablast.name: Karrablast
karrablast.flavorText: These mysterious Pokémon evolve when they receive electrical stimulation while they are in the same place as Shelmet.

escavalier.name: Escavalier
escavalier.flavorText: They fly around at high speed, striking with their pointed spears. Even when in trouble, they face opponents bravely.

foongus.name: Foongus
foongus.flavorText: It lures people in with its Poké Ball pattern, then releases poison spores. Why it resembles a Poké Ball is unknown.

amoonguss.name: Amoonguss
amoonguss.flavorText: It lures prey close by dancing and waving its arm caps, which resemble Poké Balls, in a swaying motion.

frillish.name: Frillish
frillish.flavorText: With its thin, veil-like arms wrapped around the body of its opponent, it sinks to the ocean floor.

jellicent.name: Jellicent
jellicent.flavorText: The fate of the ships and crew that wander into Jellicent’s habitat: all sunken, all lost, all vanished.

alomomola.name: Alomomola
alomomola.flavorText: The special membrane enveloping Alomomola has the ability to heal wounds.

joltik.name: Joltik
joltik.flavorText: Joltik that live in cities have learned a technique for sucking electricity from the outlets in houses.

galvantula.name: Galvantula
galvantula.flavorText: When attacked, they create an electric barrier by spitting out many electrically charged threads.

ferroseed.name: Ferroseed
ferroseed.flavorText: When threatened, it attacks by shooting a barrage of spikes, which gives it a chance to escape by rolling away.

ferrothorn.name: Ferrothorn
ferrothorn.flavorText: It fights by swinging around its three spiky feelers. A hit from these steel spikes can reduce a boulder to rubble.

klink.name: Klink
klink.flavorText: The two minigears that mesh together are predetermined. Each will rebound from other minigears without meshing.

klang.name: Klang
klang.flavorText: By changing the direction in which it rotates, it communicates its feelings to others. When angry, it rotates faster.

klinklang.name: Klinklang
klinklang.flavorText: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.

tynamo.name: Tynamo
tynamo.flavorText: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

eelektrik.name: Eelektrik
eelektrik.flavorText: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

eelektross.name: Eelektross
eelektross.flavorText: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

elgyem.name: Elgyem
elgyem.flavorText: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.

beheeyem.name: Beheeyem
beheeyem.flavorText: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.

litwick.name: Litwick
litwick.flavorText: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

lampent.name: Lampent
lampent.flavorText: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.

chandelure.name: Chandelure
chandelure.flavorText: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

axew.name: Axew
axew.flavorText: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.

fraxure.name: Fraxure
fraxure.flavorText: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.

haxorus.name: Haxorus
haxorus.flavorText: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

cubchoo.name: Cubchoo
cubchoo.flavorText: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.

beartic.name: Beartic
beartic.flavorText: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

cryogonal.name: Cryogonal
cryogonal.flavorText: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.

shelmet.name: Shelmet
shelmet.flavorText: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

accelgor.name: Accelgor
accelgor.flavorText: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

stunfisk.name: Stunfisk
stunfisk.flavorText: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

mienfoo.name: Mienfoo
mienfoo.flavorText: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.

mienshao.name: Mienshao
mienshao.flavorText: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.

druddigon.name: Druddigon
druddigon.flavorText: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.

golett.name: Golett
golett.flavorText: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.

golurk.name: Golurk
golurk.flavorText: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.

pawniard.name: Pawniard
pawniard.flavorText: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.

bisharp.name: Bisharp
bisharp.flavorText: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.

bouffalant.name: Bouffalant
bouffalant.flavorText: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

rufflet.name: Rufflet
rufflet.flavorText: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

braviary.name: Braviary
braviary.flavorText: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

vullaby.name: Vullaby
vullaby.flavorText: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.

mandibuzz.name: Mandibuzz
mandibuzz.flavorText: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

heatmor.name: Heatmor
heatmor.flavorText: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.

durant.name: Durant
durant.flavorText: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.

deino.name: Deino
deino.flavorText: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.

zweilous.name: Zweilous
zweilous.flavorText: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.

hydreigon.name: Hydreigon
hydreigon.flavorText: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

larvesta.name: Larvesta
larvesta.flavorText: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

volcarona.name: Volcarona
volcarona.flavorText: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.

cobalion.name: Cobalion
cobalion.flavorText: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.

terrakion.name: Terrakion
terrakion.flavorText: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

virizion.name: Virizion
virizion.flavorText: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

tornadus.name: Tornadus
tornadus.flavorText: The lower half of its body is wrapped in a cloud of energy. It zooms through the sky at 200 mph.

thundurus.name: Thundurus
thundurus.flavorText: Countless charred remains mar the landscape of places through which Thundurus has passed.

reshiram.name: Reshiram
reshiram.flavorText: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

zekrom.name: Zekrom
zekrom.flavorText: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.

landorus.name: Landorus
landorus.flavorText: Lands visited by Landorus grant such bountiful crops that it has been hailed as “The Guardian of the Fields.”

kyurem.name: Kyurem
kyurem.flavorText: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

keldeo.name: Keldeo
keldeo.flavorText: By blasting water from its hooves, it can glide across water. It excels at using leg moves while battling.

meloetta.name: Meloetta
meloetta.flavorText: Its melodies are sung with a special vocalization method that can control the feelings of those who hear it.

genesect.name: Genesect
genesect.flavorText: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.
